name: README Doc Drift Detector
shortDescription: Flags mismatches between documented commands and runnable project scripts.
longDescription: Checks README command references against executable script definitions to prevent onboarding and operation drift.
author: ARS Docs

inputs.name: scripts_manifest
inputs.description: Executable script definition source (e.g., package.json scripts).

includedAssets.name: scripts/check_readme_scripts.py
includedAssets.description: Compares documented npm commands against package.json scripts.

includedAssets.name: references/drift-severity-policy.md
includedAssets.description: Severity policy for documentation drift findings.

failureModes: Command extraction can miss non-standard formatting.
Aliases may appear as false drift without normalization.

examples.title: README script drift check
examples.summary: Detects stale command references after script renaming.

changelog.summary: Initial release for README command drift detection.
